knowledge: Toothing was originally a hoax claim that Bluetooth-enabled mobile phones or PDAs were being used to arrange random sexual encounters, perpetrated as a prank on the media who reported it. As observation is encouraged, voyeurism and exhibitionism are closely associated with dogging.
